channel.title: HFaceAllStories
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from HFaceAllStories, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Pullbacks will be shallow as market risks diminish, says Morgan Stanley
item.description: Earnings, capex and AI adoption are developing momentum and reducing opportunities for investors to buy into geopolitically-driven weakness

item.title: SEC fears short-term thinking, but Tesla and Amazon show long-term play
item.description: Semiannual earnings reporting tries to “fix” a problem that the market’s success stories have already solved.

item.title: Bounced check from class-action lawsuit may be a scam
item.description: “Now they are deducting that amount from her account.”

item.title: A new version of an old drug is helping men grow back some of their hair
item.description: New formulation of hair-loss drug shows robust growth in trial.
